entry.title: SAP PI with multiple inbound calls
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I have scenario where an external system makes a call to PI, then PI use that information to make a call to SAP and using the information returned from SAP, it makes another call to a third party API that will generate some data, that will passed to the original consumer (the external system). Also, the third party API uses OAuth 2.0, I don't know if this affects the scenario.

Is this scenario possible and/or is there a better aprocach to it? And how I would configure this in an ICO? 

Attached image for clarification

entry.title: Re: I do not know how to choose the suitable shortcut/com...
entry.content:
@DinuI chose Shift+Ctrl+E for Export but it did not work.. I made the same in this sample as you can see in my Code. What should I do?

 

And what can I chose as shortcut for Run.

entry.title: ZOHO CRM integration with SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi!

Could anyone advise me on FM or Classes that I can use to obtain data from ZOHO CRM? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
Inspection Characteristics
entry.content:
I have a question about Target Values when creating Inspection Characteristics.  I am creating an inspection Characteristic for a Work Center and want to know if there is a way for the Target Value, as well as the Min/Max Range values, to come from "standard" characteristics

For Example: if i have a standard characteristic called "Speed" which is calculated, is there a way for my target value in the inspection characteristic to be equal to this value "Speed"?

entry.title: Re: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public...
entry.content:
Hi @anthonyramosr,

For S/4HANA Public, you have two options:

  • BTP 
  • ABAP Cloud

For ABAP Cloud, you will require the development using Eclipse ADT and SAPUI5 front-end will be built according to a RAP development.

For more information, look at the blogs listed here:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/s4hana-cloud-abap-environment

More specifically the one written by @boris_gebhardt

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2023.004 v1.10: New Fields Added to Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
Hello, @nanda_pandit-champsi and @leonardobrunetto 🙂

The SAP Notes for the XML mapping have been released and the blog post has been updated.

Regards,

Luize

entry.title: Re: How to: Pass data into structure typed workflow Container?
entry.content: Excellent Solution ... I was not finding anywhere else .

entry.title: HCM Brasil: Atualizações e novidades de Março 2024
entry.content:
Olá a todos, bem-vindos ao blog post com as novidades de março de 2024!

Neste blog post, você vai encontrar informações sobre:

  • Resumo com as principais atualizações e novidades.
  • SAP Notes liberadas.
  • Outros blogs posts publicados.
  • Principais publicações do governo.

Finalizamos o primeiro trimestre do ano com muitas novidades e desafios e, neste blog post, abordaremos as principais atualizações e novidades ocorridas durante mês de março de 2024. Neste período, tivemos a primeira competência de recolhimento do FGTS com a plataforma do FGTS Digital e também a postergação da substituição da DIRF. Além disso, tivemos a disponibilização do Relatório de Transparência Salarial pelo governo. Por fim, as instabilidades do eSocial, DCTFWeb e e-CAC também marcaram o mês de março de 2024.

A seguir, você encontra as principais entregas realizadas pelo nosso time de localização:

SAP Notes Liberadas:

  • 3436100 - FGTS Digital - Reversal Basis not computed in taxes wage types
  • 3437632 - IRRF - Income tax calculation when 2 AJUS or 2 FERI in same month
  • 3440752 - eSocial - S-2500 - incorrect XML elements: nrInsc, infoCompl, baseMudCateg
  • 3444729 - eSocial - S-1210 - dependent with incorrect type
  • 3444193 - eSocial - S-1210 - planSaude and infoReembMed groups data when employee has two personnel number
  • 3448181 - eSocial - S-1200/S-2299 - Complementary BAdI Data - parameter for reference period
  • 3443482 - Framework to accumulate ALV nodes
  • 3437762 - HBRUQTG0 - Reprocessing incorrect old quotas

Importante:

Lembramos que a lista completa de entregas do eSocial está disponibilizada na SAP Note  3418378 - eSocial - Overview – 2024.

A seguir, você encontra os blogs posts publicados pelo nosso time durante o mês de março de 2024, bem como publicações do governo dentro do nosso contexto de folha de pagamento.

Blog posts publicados:

  • HCM Brasil: Atualizações e novidades de Fevereiro 2024

Principais publicações do governo:

  •  07 de março de 2024: foi publicada a notícia sobre as melhorias realizadas na DCTFWeb.
  • 15 de março de 2024: a Receita Federal do Brasil publicou Instrução Normativa (IN) postergando a substituição da DIRF para 2026.
  • Por fim, também no dia 15 de março de 2024: o Ministério do Trabalho e disponibilizou orientações sobre o acesso ao Relatório de Transparência Salarial por parte das empresas.

Lembramos que as alterações legais que impactam a localização de folha de pagamento para  Brasil sempre são disponibilizadas no Regulatory Change Manager.

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas.

Fiquem à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta sobre este Blog post no espaço abaixo. E não esqueçam de seguir a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para ficarem ligados nas últimas notícias.

Um abraço,

Leandro D’Avila

entry.title: Re: Access if you get locked out of application using IAS?
entry.content:
Hi @PhillipButts,

Certificate authentication shouldn't be the single-option to login anyway. 

In case the certificate is revoked or expired, the system should give you a fallback screen - which would require you to login using another supported method (like id and password). 

Try removing the expired certificate from the machine and see if you get a login form. From there you should be able to login and add the required certificate.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: Rep Schedule in DS Mgmt Console
entry.content:
Repository Schedules is where you manage scheduled jobs that you want to run on a schedule: every day, every hour, once a week etc...

In "Batch Job Configuration", choose "Add Schedule" for the job you want to run on a schedule.

entry.title: Re: Insights from the Pregame Show for the Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum 2024
entry.content:
You will share in a blog each day plus I am sharing on linkedin daily

 

http://linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina

entry.title: Re: LMS: Due Date based on the completion date of another item inside the same curriculum
entry.content: Hello Karen. I have a similar scenario. We want to assign an item A immediately upon hire with a due date 30 days after start. Then assign a refresher item B one year after completion of item A. If we use your method, upon completion of Item A, Item B will be immediately assigned and show up on their learning page. How do we get Item B to get assigned 1 year after completion of Item A, not show up on their learning page, and still keep a due date of 30 days to complete Item B after assignment?

entry.title: Re: Auto Deleted Line Items of PR
entry.content:
Hi,

As mentioned in the note # 2075110 - No change log for the deletion of requisitions created through MRP , there is no change log in case the PR is deleted via MRP. You may check the PR creation indicator and confirm the same.

If its manually created PR, you may check whether there is any custom program which is creating the issue.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: LMS: Due Date based on the completion date of another item inside the same curriculum
entry.content: To clarify, not show up on their learning page until it's assigned a year later, and keep the due date of 30 days after assignment.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

It's been two days since the build isn't working. I left a comment in another discussion, but there hasn't been any response from anyone on the SAP team. Is anyone else experiencing this issue?

I'm seriously considering migrating to another platform. The response time from SAP for incidents on this platform is very poor.

Runtime version: 4.9.218; AB version: 2.1.14COMMAND:
NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2023.004 v1.10: New Fields Added to Nota Fiscal
entry.content:
Hello @luize_boyen 

Thank you very much for the update.

Regards,

Nanda.

entry.title: Re: Best way to generate Microsoft Word docx from ABAP
entry.content:
Hello @Olaf2  it is not possible. this solution does not use Microsoft Word to generate docx.

what is your case for using macro? maybe there is another way. I do not have enough experience to see why macro needs.

entry.title: Re: Access if you get locked out of application using IAS?
entry.content: Thanks. We are contemplating moving away from Standard Authentication but it seems we will need to keep that as a way in if needed.

entry.title: Re: Need to show error message in MIR7 If vendor belongs...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer the BAdI: MRM_HEADER_CHECK which allows customer specific checks. Refer the note # 1156325 - BAdIs in the Logistics Invoice Verification environment which explains more enhancement options in MIRO.

Regards,

entry.title: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies.
entry.content:
Reproduction steps

1)Created new Web API project in Visual studio 2022 and using Target Framework .NET 8.0, Platform target is Any CPU

2)Added package through NuGet is SAPHanaForNetCore 3.1.0 package

3)deploying the project on Azure app service and OS is Linux and getting below error 2024-04-01T14:35:07.4105784Z ---> System.DllNotFoundException: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies. In order to help diagnose loading problems, consider using a tool like strace. If you're using glibc, consider setting the LD_DEBUG environment variable: /home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll: invalid ELF header at System.Runtime.InteropServices.NativeLibrary.Load(String libraryPath)

Description

Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies. In order to help diagnose loading problems, consider using a tool like strace. If you're using glibc, consider setting the LD_DEBUG environment variable: I am using Visual Studio 2022 and Architecture is "Any CPU" I have downloaded the SAPHanaForNetCore 3.1.0 package through nuget

entry.title: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies.
entry.content:
Reproduction steps

1)Created new Web API project in Visual studio 2022 and using Target Framework .NET 8.0, Platform target is Any CPU

2)Added package through NuGet is SAPHanaForNetCore 3.1.0 package

3)deploying the project on Azure app service and OS is Linux and getting below error 2024-04-01T14:35:07.4105784Z ---> System.DllNotFoundException: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies. In order to help diagnose loading problems, consider using a tool like strace. If you're using glibc, consider setting the LD_DEBUG environment variable: /home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll: invalid ELF header at System.Runtime.InteropServices.NativeLibrary.Load(String libraryPath)

Description

Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies. In order to help diagnose loading problems, consider using a tool like strace. If you're using glibc, consider setting the LD_DEBUG environment variable: I am using Visual Studio 2022 and Architecture is "Any CPU" I have downloaded the SAPHanaForNetCore 3.1.0 package through nuget

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: 33dd4792f122594f2e9dd6ff79275af9da58adba26eec071cb2b072bda6df7b5

entry.title: SAC Story - How to show YOY % based on dynamic date selection
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have a requirement where user wants to select a Date from Date input control and look at the Headcount  for same date for last 5 years. 

Example- if user selects 3/10/2024, we need to show them headcount for 3/10/2023, 3/10/2022, 3/10/2021 and 3/10/2020

They would also like to see Growth %. Example - For 3/10/2024 Growth % compare to 3/10/2023 headcount, for 3/10/2023 Growth % compare to 3/10/2022 headcount..

What would be the most effective approach to accomplish this task?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies.
entry.content:
See if this helps you:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-clients-dot-net-core.html

Connect Using the SAP HANA .NET Interface | SAP Tutorials

 
SAP Developer Center
https://developers.sap.com › hana-clients-dot-net-core
Aug 16, 2020 — Create and debug a .NET application that connects to SAP HANA using the SAP HANA client.

entry.title: Re: the purchasing group extract reason details not appea...
entry.content:
Hello 

The SAP Sourcing / Contract Lifecycle Management product was tagged.  Is that the correct product for your question?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: ef7c198edecc78ba162aaf710745dd7a3cc073774a99c8e0619326dfb67ccdae

entry.title: Re: List Report V4 - Hide Copy action button
entry.content: Hi @I311295 , I suppose you are using a lower UI5 version. In my case I found the bug with sap.ui.version 1.120.0 & 1.120.1, but seems like in 1.120.2 it's fixed i.e., via manifest change like you have mentioned should be sufficient to suppress the Copy button.

entry.title: Re: Melbourne BTP Innovation Day & Stammtisch Mar '24
entry.content: Missed this one , looks like a great opportunity to catch up

entry.title: SAP Build Code: purpose of .code files
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have completed SAP Build Code Test Drive tutorials. During the development process, I noticed several files with the extension '.code'.

Could you please clarify the purpose of these files and the potential consequences of editing or removing them?

{
    "version": "2.0",
    "codes": [],
    "configuration": {
        "phase": "on",
        "events": [
            "CREATE"
        ],
        "entity": "loyaltyProgramSrv.Purchases"
    },
    "hash": "710aa051dcacd2609053c4d3517c688c4b4792abad4454d7bc203bfd5f6b5a56ef7e620d7e7db9ad922c7c6eae302cc6fc98da704728746cdc31459744fe5dd8"
}

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: SAP Build Code: Java support
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Can we select Java when adding application logic within SAP Build Code?  The product page states :

Generative AI-based code development with Joule copilot, optimized for Java and JavaScript application development.

However, I couldn't find an option for selecting languages when creating a project or adding application logic.

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: Re: SAP opens Brewery, starts making Beer
entry.content: I read this on the 2nd of April but even without the announcements I could IMMEDIATELY tell that this is a hoax as it does not mention SAP BTP even once and we all know that licensing and other IP law ensure that everyone has to mention SAP BTP at least twice per paragraph in anything they write, even excuse letters to the school to get your daughter out of PE.

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Olá, @luciamendes

Cada cliente deverá criar a regra para o preenchimento do campo INDDEDUZDESON. Como mencionado pelo @Silvano_Furlan as regras para o mapeamento dos novos campos na estrutura do XML ainda não haviam sido liberados. A boa notícia é que as SAP Notes referentes ao mapeamento foram liberadas e o blog foi atualizado com as mesmas. 🥳

entry.title: Using Function in background in Sap Gateway Methods
entry.content:
Hello experts 

I need to create a material quotation through a SAPUI5 application. However, when I include the quotation creation function in the method, the request breaks due to the quantity of materials. I thought about using a background function, but even then, the method remains stuck waiting for the function to finish. Is there a way to achieve this? Has anyone encountered something similar?

entry.title: Re: Migration cockpit - different approach shown for same project in same system different client
entry.content: I'm facing the same issue, Klaus. Looks like a bug.

entry.title: Re: Hi Team, comma separator for the values
entry.content: I am using the smartforms, Here i need to display the value with comma separated and i used the data type char15, Tried with integer also not worked

entry.title: Re: Hi Team, comma separator for the values
entry.content: I am using it in smartforms and the data type is char15

entry.title: Re: NT 2020.001, versão 1.50 – Evento de manifestação do destinatário
entry.content:
Boa noite a todos,

Estou com a mesma dúvida do meu colega do post, revirei a SAP e não encontrei nenhuma nota e a pergunta é. Se o GRC será descontinuado em 2025 a SAP irá lançar nota mesmo assim, ou os clientes devem se preocupar em já migrar para o DRC?

entry.title: Manage teams & responsibilities not showing category Type
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use a Fiori Tile called Manage teams and Responsibilities (Procurement) but somehow I am not able to find Purchasing Category. 

Screenshot is attached.

Thanks,

Sanan Afridi

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content: (PT-BR) Alguma novidade, estamos ansiosos e preocupados  @MaiaraEllwanger ???

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content: (PT-BR) Boa noite, mesmo com uma outra lista de falhas relatada abaixo, chegou a testar novamente sua solução? Obteve algum sucesso?

entry.title: Re: Custom Analytical Queries : create button disabled (S...
entry.content:
Hello Vèche. In the SAP S/4HANA system, cloud starter edition,  extensibility for key users is deactivated by default.

You can activate extensibility by yourself. Open the Fiori application Extensibility Settings and follow the activation process.

Extensibility Settings for Extensibility Specialist
https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4017')/S32

In addition you can enable runtime extensibility for a query in the Custom Analytical Queries app and enable business users to add additional fields to a multidimensional report. Learn more with documentation

 

In addition you can learn about creating analytical queries with documentation 

Hope this helps

 

Thanks

entry.title: SuccessFactors Learning Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found here (Authentication Required)

Please join us and our Recognized Expert partners as we jointly host our Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Learning product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.

Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

Each session is held twice per month.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Recruiting Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found here (Authentication Required)

Please join us and our Recognized Expert partners as we jointly host our Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Recruiting product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.

Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

Each session is held twice per month.

entry.title: NT005.2023 – v1.50 - Criação do Evento Insucesso na Entrega da NF-e
entry.content:
Caros colegas,

Temos a NT005.2023 – v1.50 - Criação do Evento Insucesso na Entrega da NF-e, que tem por entrada em PRD – 24/06/2024, buscando informações nos blogs ou na SAP não vi nenhuma SAP note ou sobre o assunto.

Alguém já pegou esse caso?

 

Obrigada

entry.title: SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (French/English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found with our full schedule here (Authentication Required)

Please join us for our Recruiting Posting Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.


Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content:
Yes I am getting the same error:

Runtime version: 4.9.218; AB version: 2.1.14COMMAND:
NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r

It's very frustrating for sure.  I am also getting errors with updated Marketplace items.  Specifically, the "Create a new data record" and the like.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@MioYasuatke 

Are you able to get the workflow-ui-module controller to load so you can inspect it in the dev tools? I can see in the network tab that the workflow-ui-module is called, but I don't see it in the folder structure so I can do debugging. See below. I can only see the controller for the wrapper. Any thoughts about this?

entry.title: SuccessFactors Customer Onboarding Webinar - North America
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Register Here

SuccessFactors Customer Onboarding Webinar Series (English)

Whether SAP SuccessFactors is new to you or your organization, we are excited to welcome you to the SuccessFactors Family! Join our monthly Customer Onboarding webinar to learn how to get started with SuccessFactors, see the key resources available to you, and lots more. What to expect?

  • Getting started: System access and S-User Management
  • SAP Product Support Best Practices
  • SuccessFactors Training Resources and Offerings
  • Live Demo of our one-stop-shop: The SAP SuccessFactors Customer Community

This is a MUST to get you started on a successful journey with SuccessFactors!

Please contact SAP_HXM_Onboarding@sap.com for any questions on this webinar series.

Here is a link to our Global schedule

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors 客户启动网络研讨会（中文
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Register Here

参加我们每月举行的SuccessFactors 客户启动网络研讨会中的一场，来了解有助于实现 SAP SuccessFactors 快速成功上线的最佳实践和资源。
这是让您开启 SuccessFactors 成功旅程的必备条件

Please contact SAP_HXM_Onboarding@sap.com for any questions on this webinar series.

Here is a link to our Global schedule

entry.title: SuccessFactors Customer Onboarding Webinar - Portuguese
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Register Here

SuccessFactors Customer Onboarding Webinar Series (Portuguese)

Whether SAP SuccessFactors is new to you or your organization, we are excited to welcome you to the SuccessFactors Family! Join our monthly Customer Onboarding webinar to learn how to get started with SuccessFactors, see the key resources available to you, and lots more. What to expect?

  • Getting started: System access and S-User Management
  • SAP Product Support Best Practices
  • SuccessFactors Training Resources and Offerings
  • Live Demo of our one-stop-shop: The SAP SuccessFactors Customer Community

This is a MUST to get you started on a successful journey with SuccessFactors!

Please contact SAP_HXM_Onboarding@sap.com for any questions on this webinar series.

Here is a link to our Global schedule

Whether SAP SuccessFactors is new to you or your organization, we are excited to welcome you to the SuccessFactors Family! Join our monthly Customer Onboarding webinar to learn how to get started with SuccessFactors, see the key resources available to you, and lots more. What to expect?

  • Getting started: System access and S-User Management
  • SAP Product Support Best Practices
  • SuccessFactors Training Resources and Offerings
  • Live Demo of our one-stop-shop: The SAP SuccessFactors Customer Community

This is a MUST to get you started on a successful journey with SuccessFactors!

Please contact SAP_HXM_Onboarding@sap.com for any questions on this webinar series.

Here is a link to our Global schedule

entry.title: How to add field(Company Code) in Smart Business Fiori App Close Evolotion(F3844) ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am trying to extend one Fiori App (Close Evolotion) in SAP S4HANA Financial Closing Cockpit. I want to add a company code. I want to parse the processor area and use it, but can you share a best practice and the document about the next steps after extending the CDS? Is there any obstacle to extending this CDS?

In cube, this field appears in the comments. Opening it may also be an option. If we need to do association, we can consider that too?

entry.title: there is a simple way to make a Single API POST to create Multiple Rows?
entry.content:
Dear Experts:

i have this API structure:

i want to send 5 or more rows on a single POST. is this posible in SAP Build Apps? (AKA AppGyver)

if i can i think i need to use a formula in the "Create Record" flow function? or just need to map the values of the my "List of Objects" that store information of my multiple rows?

Or i need to do a single row create until my object gets empty? (using flow functions)

entry.title: Re: RAP: Creating a child entity with 'create by associat...
entry.content: Yep, worked with inline creation mode while awaiting your answer and it worked out well. I agree this is the best approach. Appreciate taking time to answer my questions, Patrick!

entry.title: SAP Table Creation, Maintenance, and Authorization
entry.content:
Creating Custom Tables for Table Maintenance

Go to SE11 and give the table name that you want to create.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Give the Description of the table and enter the following details.

1. Delivery Class

Delivery Class Used For

  • A - Application table (master and transaction data).
  • C -Customer table: data is maintained by the customer only
  • L  - Table for storing temporary data
  • G  - Customer table, SAP may insert new data records, but may not overwrite or delete existing data records. The customer namespace must be defined in table TRESC. (Use Report RDDKOR54 here).
  • E - System table with its own namespaces for customer entries. The customer namespace must be defined in table TRESC. (Use Report RDDKOR54 here.)
  • S - System table, data changes have the same status as program changes.
  • W - System table (e.g. table of the development environment) whose data is transported with its own transport objects (e.g. R3TR PROG, R3TR TABL, etc.).

2. Data Browser/Table View Maint.

Options Available

  1. Display/maintenance not allowed: The usage of standard table maintenance tools is not allowed.
    • Maintenance and display of this Dictionary object is not possible in transaction SE16.
    • Transaction SE54 does not allow the generation of a maintenance dialog, which means automatically calling transactions SM30/SM34 for this Dictionary object is no longer possible.
  2. Display/maintenance allowed to limited extent: Usage of standard table maintenance tools is allowed to a limited extent.
    •  Transaction SE16 allows the display function for this Dictionary object, but no maintenance.
    • Generation of a maintenance dialog for this Dictionary object is possible using transaction SE54.
    • Transaction SM30 does not allow maintenance and display functions for this Dictionary object
  3. Display/maintenance allowed: The usage of standard table maintenance tools is allowed:
    • Transaction SE16 allows the maintenance and display functions for this Dictionary object. Note: If an SM30 maintenance dialog exists for this Dictionary object, it is called.
    • Transaction SE54 allows the generation of a maintenance dialog for this Dictionary object.
    • Transaction SM30 allows the display and maintenance functions for this Dictionary object.

Enter the Fields of the table.

Significance of the Above fields:

  • LASTCHANGED: Username of the person who created or changed the data.
  • CHANGEDATE: The date on which the records was created or changed.
  • CHANGE_TIME: The time on which the records was created or changed.
  • COMMENTS: The reason for the changes made to be specified by the user.

Once all the fields have been entered then, click on Technical Settings and enter the following details on the next screen:

Data Class

The data class defines the physical area of the database (for ORACLE, the TABLESPACE) in which your table is logically stored. If you choose a data class correctly, your table will automatically be assigned to the correct area when it is created on the database.

The most important data classes are (other than the system data):

  • APPL0: Master data
  • APPL1: Transaction data
  • APPL2: Organizational and customizing data

Master data is data that is frequently read but rarely updated. Transaction data is data that is frequently updated. Organizational and customizing data is data that is defined when the system is initialized and then rarely changed.

Two more data classes are available, USR and USR1. These are reserved for user developments, and the tables assigned to these data classes are stored in a table space for user developments.

Note: The data class only has an effect on table storage for the database systems ORACLE and INFORMIX.

Size Category

The size category determines the probable space requirement for a table in the database.

You can select categories 0 to 4 for your table. Each category is assigned a specific fixed storage area value in the database. When you create a table, initial space is saved for it in the database. If more space is required later due to data that has been entered, the storage space is increased in accordance with the category selected.

Press F4 on the field size category to see the number of data records that can be maintained for the individual categories of your table without complications ensuing. These complications could be for example a reorganization becoming necessary because the maximum space to be reserved for the table was exceeded due to the maintained size category.

Buffering Status

The buffering status specifies whether or not a table may be buffered.

This depends on how the table is used, for example, on the expected volume of data in the table or on the type of access to a table (mainly read or mainly write access to the table). In the latter case, for example, one would not select buffering.

You should, therefore, select:

  • Buffering is not allowed if a table is not buffered.
  • Buffering allowed but not activated if buffering is principally allowed for a table, but at the moment no buffering should be active. The buffering type specified in this case is only a suggestion.
  • Buffering is allowed if the table should be buffered. In this case, a buffering type must be specified.

Buffering Type

The buffering type defines whether and how the table should be buffered.

There are the following types of buffering:

  • single-record buffering --> Press F1 for more details
  • generic area buffering --> Press F1 for more details
  • full buffering --> Press F1 for more details

In generic area buffering, a number of key fields between 1 and no. of key fields-1 must be specified.

No. Of Key Fields for Generic Buffers

If you read a record from a generically buffered table, all records whose left-justified part of the key corresponds to that of this record (generic key fields) are loaded into the buffer.

This left-justified part of the key is determined in this field by entering a number n of key fields. The first n key fields of the table are thus the generic key fields.

Create Authorization Object

To create an Authorization Object, go to transaction SE54.

Enter the Table/View name for which the Authorization object has to be created.

Select the Radio Button ‘Authorization groups’.

Then click on Create/Change.

Then, the next screen will give a list of Authorization Objects that are already present in the system. You can Select one of them from the available list as per the requirement. But if the table demands a new authorization object then click on New Entries pushbutton given on the screen.

Enter the new authorization object name and description as shown in the screen below. The authorization object must follow a certain naming convention. (It should always start with 'Z'.) Click on Save

Table Maintenance Generator

  1. Go to SE12 transaction. Open the table for which the table maintenance is to be implemented.
  2. Change it to the Editable mode and then click on Utilities -> Table maintenance generator.

Enter the following details on the next screen:

  • Authorization group: Assigned/created for the table by following the procedure given in Section I.
  • Function group: Name of the function group to which the generated maintenance modules will belong.
  • Maintenance type: According to the table requirement, anyone should be selected.
    • One step: Only one maintenance screen is processed during extended table maintenance. The entries are displayed in list form on this screen.
    • Two step: Two maintenance screens are processed during the extended table maintenance:

On the Overview screen, the entries are displayed in list form.

One entry is displayed on the single screen. For every entry, the single screen can be called from the overview screen by pressing the function key.

Maintenance Screen No

According to the maintenance type selected, an overview screen and a single screen should be entered. Recording routine—This is an indicator of the recording routine that should be used for the table contents.

  • Standard recording routine
  • No, or user, recording routine

Compare Flag

This flag indicates whether the maintenance transaction allows the (checked) activation of Business Configuration Sets (BC Sets) and the adjustment. This is the case if the maintenance transaction can run in the background. There are four options present for the compare flag:

  • No Information
  • Not Adjustable
  • Adjustable in Dialog
  • Automatically Adjustable

Once done. Click on Create.

Exceptions

If changes are made to the table after the generation of table maintenance, table maintenance should be re-generated for the table.

1. Click on Utilities -> Table Maintenance Generator.

 2. Click on the Edit button. A pop-up would ask for Reason for change. Select the appropriate reasons.

3. Then, Save the data.

4. Go to System -> Status and copy the Program Name.

Changing the Source Code of Table Maintenance

If fields like last changed on, last changed by, etc., are present in the table, logic should be included to save them by the system.

1. Go to transaction SE80 and open the program that was received from the above logic.

2. Go to the Screens drop-down list and click on 0001. In the PAI event of that screen, add a module to include the logic.

3. Double-click on the module. It will ask for the ‘Include’ in which this module should be included.

4. Select the Include where we need to include the logic.

 5. Enter the logic to update the table with the parameters --> person responsible for making change, timestamp, etc. It is as shown below:

6. Go to the layout of the screen

7. Once you click on the Layout button, the screen below will appear.

8. Enter the text to be displayed as the column heading in the output screen.

9. Change the attributes of the fields of the table that are required to be non-editable as 'OUTPUT ONLY', i.e., the fields LASTCHANGED, CHANGEDATE, and CHANGE_TIME. The Columns will automatically be grayed out and uneditable on the output screen.

10. Save and Activate the changes.

 

Create Transaction

1. To create a transaction, go to transaction SE93. Enter the transaction name which is to be created.

2. Click on Create.

3. Enter the Short text and the Start Object and select Ok.

4. Enter the below details and the Click on SAVE

     

5. Enter the created T-code and the below screen would appear as output.

 

6. Click on the New Entries button to create an entry in the table. Enter the details and then click on SAVE.

7. As soon as you click on the save button the username, Date and Time appears automatically.

8. You can check the same data in the Se16 transaction for the table.

 Conclusion:

I hope I was able to give you a little insight into how the you can create, maintain and add security on a custom SAP table.

I would love to hear back suggestions, feedback and questions that you might have. Please do share the article with your Team members, Colleagues and Friends working in SAP and who use or plan to use SAP custom table to maintain critical data in SAP. Also, don’t forget to like and share the blog and follow me on SAP blogs to not miss more content: maheshsinghmony

Reference: https://dzone.com/articles/sap-table-creation-maintenance-and-authorization

entry.title: REST client error in CAPM application in BTP
entry.content:
When I click on Sendrequest am getting below error message. How I can get rid of this error message??

entry.title: Re: There is a nice way to clear List of Objects in SAP BUILD APPS (AKA Appgyver)?
entry.content:
This is great i as simple as i wanted.

Just putting "[]" (without the quotes) and tats all.

i will stay tuned with the CodeJam if you stream something.

sorry if my English isnt verry clear i am Peruvian and im not fluent in english

entry.title: Re: How to add a custom field on purchase order item level in the app Manage Purchase orders
entry.content: I have the same issue, may I know the resolution you got for this?

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Mark112358 

You can find the controller of your task ui under resources/bparoleassginmentui/workflowuimodule/controller.

entry.title: Re: REST client error in CAPM application in BTP
entry.content:
Resolved by my self

URL got changd recently 

sample URL path

http://localhost:4004/odata/v4/CatalogService/$metadata

entry.title: Hello and help?
entry.content:
Hi All, 
I'm brand new here, just signed up today.
I am wanting to join the HCM board, so I can post the below question - but there doesn't seem to be a button to join? Any clues?

QUESTION:

Can someone please clarify the best way to set up an initial and refresher training in SAP SuccessFactors? Currently the substitutions feature is being used to kick off a 3-year countdown, however this set up method is creating a lot of surplus completion data, that is confusing for users, but also not useful for reporting.

Context: 
1. Learning Item One - completed by the user first
2. Learning Item Two - completed by the user three years after they complete Learning Item One. Learning Item Two is then completed by the user every three years.
3. Learning Item Two (the refresher training) appears in the users 'My Learning Assignments' list 30 days before the three-year period is up.
4. User completes the refresher training, and the three-year countdown starts again.

We are currently here:
Curricula one with Assignment Profile assigns Learning Item One to users.
Curricula two with Assignment Profile assigns Learning Item Two to users, based on their completion of Learning Item One. Retraining set to 1,095 days.
Problem we have: Learning Item Two is appearing in users 'My Learning Assignments' list as soon as they have completed Learning Item One. This is not what we want, we want Learning Item Two to appear in three years' time. We know it's because of the way we have set up the items, but we don't know the best way to set it up to deliver the outcome we want.

Any tips / tricks or documentation on best practice initial and refresher training set up would be much appreciated.

entry.title: SAP B1 Cloud ControlCenter Addon To-Install Struck
entry.content:
Dear Team,

While deploying extension on Cloud, We are facing issue that add-on stays in 'To Install' status in Cloud Control Center. I have followed troubleshoot method on Community but no luck. Please help us to resolve the issue.

Community-Page for troubleshooting CCC Addon issues 

Regards,

Maaz

entry.title: Unable to Print multiple copies of same form
entry.content:
Our requirement is to print Original, Duplicate , Triplicate copy in words on Invoice Form Print which is not possible with output parameter determination.




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Print multiple copies of same form
entry.content:
Dear customer,

If you'd like to print multiple output items for one application document, you can either duplicate the generated output item within each application app, or you can please follow the KBA below to maintain the steps for 'Output Type' 'Receiver' and 'Channel' to ensure they have multiple combinations.

2757763 - How to print to multiple print queues or generate multiple output items

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I'm Lan Vu Luu Hoang, and I'm studying Management Information Systems at the University of Economics and Law, Vietnam University. I recently finished an ERP management course that required me to use SAP technology. Through this encounter, I've been familiar with SAP ERP. I'm eager to learn more about SAP systems since I think it will broaden my perspective and increase my employability in the future. I eagerly look forward to being considered for this digital skills initiative!

Best regards,

Lan

entry.title: Re: Difference between Purchase Info Record and Source List
entry.content: Hi, this is an old thread but some of the comments are out of date. Source lists were important in the ECC Business Client, but they have limited functionality in S/4HANA. Refer to SAP Note 2268069 S4TWL - Simplified Sourcing for more information, then search for 'source list'. https://me.sap.com/notes/2268069/E

entry.title: Re: pass range value via URL Parameter in SAC
entry.content: Sorry for late. I really appreciate it! Have a good day, edgar!

entry.title: Odata Query not working when using '=' symbol
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an Odata Query which is working (getting data) fine when i use 'eq' as below:

/sap/opu/odata/SAP/Z*****_01/BPInputsSet?$format=json&$filter= Account eq '800000012341' and Prodtyp eq 'EWR' &$expand=NavtoData1,NavtoData2&$format=json

But when i replace 'EQ' with '='  its throwing error like " 400 : Invalid token detected at position.".etc

How to correct this error?

entry.title: S4HC/工单结算余额不平
entry.content:
HI,SAP专家老师

我们最近2个月总是出现，工单入库完成后，又发现工单有问题，然后对入库进行122退货，但是退货的时候又是在不同的月份，这样就会导致月末工单结算的时候工单总是结算不平。这种情况是不是正常结算就可以了？只是当月结算一次，下月在结算一次？还是说有什么其它的解决办法？

Dear Expert,

When we expert variables data through C4C Data Workbench, is there a way we can export the data with watermarket to enforce on the data privacy?

Or a better integrated way behind the scene we can do for customer?

thanks,
~Chester

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content:
Hello guys,

Until now, I haven't been able to meet my client's needs. I would like an opinion from SAP to know if I need a paid version to determine if I can set deadlines with my client.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 with Invoice Plan (SE 771)
entry.content:
Thanks for your reply.

Through BAPI_PO_GETDETIAL1, I noticed that the parameter INVOICE_PERCENTAGE is different.
[DOC_ITEM = 00010] is created by BAPI_PO_CREATE. It's INVOICE_PERCENTAGE is 100.00, but I was not pass this parameter which may be automatically calculated by BAPI.
[DOC_ITEM = 00020] is created by ME22N.  It's INVOICE_PERCENTAGE is 0.00.

By the way, when I try to change the BILL_VALUE of the item which was created by BAPI, try to change it from 13,333,330 to 13,333,331 through ME22N, and change it back to 13,333,330, the error message appeared (SE 772 Sum of percentages is not 100% of item value). When changing it to 1,334, error will not appear.

Is this a program bug?

entry.title: Re: How to check the maximum length of a function import parameter in SEGW based OData services
entry.content:
hi Andre. 
Your blog explains why I'm having an issue with one of our Fiori apps. I have a textArea object and I set the maxlength to 300, but in my metadata, it shows up as 200 maxlength. 
Now I understand that with newer SAP_GWFND component (756 0004), USE_STRICT_FUNCTION_PARAM_CHK is set to X, and therefore, my Fiori app is failing if I enter an text > 200. 

Thanks to your blog, I understand I can re-define DEFINE( ) method in my Model Provider Class
to control this feature. Is this correct assumption?

The mystery is why the max length shows up as 200 and not 300 in my metadata. 

Thanks again
William

entry.title: Re: Handling Large Data With SAP Cloud Platform Integration OData V2 Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @gautham_krishna ,

How to handle case if upper limit of 99999 is reached but we still have more number of records?

BR,

RJ

entry.title: Re: Automatic creation of the job info and compensation p...
entry.content:
Hello,

You should be able to achieve this via Offcycle Event batch job.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI with multiple inbound calls
entry.content:
Hello dholtzrs,

You can create 2 ICos if possible. 

1- External to SAP (RESTSender to SOAPXIReceiver)

2- SAP to 3rd Party (SOAPXISender to RESTReceiver)

After the step "Returns Data" SAP ERP can consume the 2nd ICo (SAP to 3rd Party) and receive data from 3rd party. An ABAP Developer can map the data from 3rd party into the response structure of the 1st ICo.

Good luck.

Caner.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI with multiple inbound calls
entry.content: The way I see your requirement it would need to do some REST Lookup (there are blogs about this) and some significant Java Mappings to handling those calls to the third party API.

entry.title: In SAP PO we are trying to extract an excel with all the ICOs and related Configuration scenarios.
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP PO ,we are trying to extract an excel with all the ICOs and related Configuration scenarios. Is there a way to do it instead of manually extracting the list from ID ?

entry.title: Re: It's Christmas! Ollama+Phi-2 on SAP AI Core

I have an update version meanwhile which also translates the DELETE verb to POST because kserve or AI Core restricts the http-verbs, so models can also be deleted remotely. Particularly Llava 1.6 is an amazing model to run.

entry.title: What is Statistical Key Figures in Timesheet (CATS Booking) ?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We have a business requirement where we need to make use of the Statistical Key Figures and the types associated with it in the CATS Process (Timesheet Booking). 

I would like to explore the options and learn about the different types of Statistical Key Figures which we can utilize.

Thanks in advance for any leads.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Re: Unable to Generate Bank Reconciliation Report
entry.content: What is the SAP Business One Version? Make a copy of the database, check on it by running th Restore > Restore System Reports.

entry.title: Restrict some IP (BTP data center IP) for Outbound Call from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello,

This is the 2nd time I have encountered the same problem where receiving party is saying that they can whitelist up-to 6 IPs only. We are having SAP Integration Suite as middle ware where some data is being send from SAP to Receiving party via API/SFTP.

I have asked the same to SAP but as per them it is not possible to restrict IPs for outbound connection. Some time receiving party adjust and whitelist all the IPs but in case of they simply denied and we don't have any solution.

 

For the solution I have come across where as per the SAP note we can minimize the IP via cloud connector but not able to find how to do that. Can someone guide on this topic.

 

reference screenshot from SAP note : 3209308 

Thanks,

Aman Sharma

entry.title: Re: List Report V4 - Hide Copy action button
entry.content: I tried with latest UI5 version 1.122.1 with manifest.json changes.... But still Copy button appears in screen.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Connecting to Messaging Systems using the AMQP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @mandy_krimmel 

Could you please help us in understanding the usability of concurrent process parameter in AMQP adapter. Our tenant is running with 8 nodes and we are using Cloud connector to connect to messaging system. And the AMQP sender adapter is configured with 10 concurrent processes.  In messaging system and in the cloud connector we could see only 8 connections. But we expecting to see 80 connections (8 Nodes * 10 Concurrent Processes) created from SAP Integration Suite to Messaging System. And there are around 10k messages to be consumed from the messaging system. Please advise on this behavior.

 

Thanks

Parthi

entry.title: Re: Future Remit for vendor Liability Ageing Report in SA...
entry.content:
Hi,

The Online help provide with the explanation of the Future remit at following link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/a8d7ac9975754253ae9aac47387f73c6.html

Future Remit:

Displays all open receivables owed by the customer according to the date selected in the Age By field and for which the date specified in the Aging Date field has not yet been reached

Example

The customer has an open A/R invoice for USD100, due on May 1st.

In the Age By field, Due Date is selected.

The Aging Date field is set to April 28th.

Since the invoice is due after the aging date, the invoice amount is displayed in the Future Remit column.

You can also check the following thread:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/aging-report/qaq-p/5850304

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Error While updating business partner payment terms u...
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you checked similar on the DEMO database and are you able to update the Business Partner Payment Terms using DTW?

Check in the database on which you are updating the Business Partner Payment Terms, whether you have some additional code in the Stored Procedure and whether they are interfering in update.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: EWM : POSC Inbound Door determination using HU Type I...
entry.content:
Hi,

"After debugging the issue with door determinations using  WH process Type + Door Det Grp + HU Type we get to know that TU is checked against Delivery when it is distributed in EWM."

Yes, these fields are only used in the determination if you use the TU based transportation integration. And then it is the HU type which is assigned to the packaging material of the TU.

"Can anyone please suggest how can we make it work without TU or is there any workaround possible."

The standard does not use the packaging information at all.  You might find a BAdI to influence the determination using the HU from the PDI.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hello, I have recently come across @David_Chaviano 's blog post regarding Digital Skills Initiative and I am writing to express my interest in a free certificate attempt.

I am a young man with 0.8 year of experience as an SAP BTP integration Suite and I want to upskill myself with the SAP technologies.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content: Interested

entry.title: Re: 1250000126 - No state found for ship-to address 'Ship...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check if the following query gives any result:

select "DataSource","MailCountr",* from OCRD o
where "MailCountr" = 'IN' and not exists (select 1 from CRD1 where "CardCode" = o."CardCode" and "AdresType" = 'S')

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: 404 Error in Learning Journeys
entry.content:
All the Learning Journeys work again. Thank you a lot for the help @Margit_Wagner 🙂

Best Regards
